'''ngashotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dmg|dmg]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dmg|dmg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngashotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæshetheth|ngæshetheth]] || [[word:ngæshethej|ngæshethej]] || [[word:ngæshethesh|ngæshethesh]] || [[word:ngæshethe|ngæshethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashoshothoth|ngashoshothoth]] || [[word:ngashoshothoj|ngashoshothoj]] || [[word:ngashoshothosh|ngashoshothosh]] || [[word:ngashoshotho|ngashoshotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngashothoth|ngashothoth]] || [[word:ngashothoj|ngashothoj]] || [[word:ngashothosh|ngashothosh]] || [[word:ngashotho|ngashotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashofthoth|ngashofthoth]] || [[word:ngashofthoj|ngashofthoj]] || [[word:ngashofthosh|ngashofthosh]] || [[word:ngashofthof|ngashofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngashothotho|ngashothotho]] || [[word:ngashothojo|ngashothojo]] || [[word:ngashothosho|ngashothosho]] || [[word:ngashothoko|ngashothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngashothoth|ngashothoth]] || [[word:ngashothoj|ngashothoj]] || [[word:ngashothosh|ngashothosh]] || [[word:ngashotho|ngashotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngashothothol|ngashothothol]] || [[word:ngashothojol|ngashothojol]] || [[word:ngashothoshol|ngashothoshol]] || [[word:ngashothokol|ngashothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngashothothotho|ngashothothotho]] || [[word:ngashothojojo|ngashothojojo]] || [[word:ngashothoshosho|ngashothoshosho]] || [[word:ngashothoko|ngashothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngashothothon|ngashothothon]] || [[word:ngashothojon|ngashothojon]] || [[word:ngashothoshon|ngashothoshon]] || [[word:ngashothokon|ngashothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngashothothoro|ngashothothoro]] || [[word:ngashothojoro|ngashothojoro]] || [[word:ngashothoshoro|ngashothoshoro]] || [[word:ngashothokoro|ngashothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
